descriptions:
['The individual that gains temporary use of the #Goods by paying the #Lessor

<ex><fex name="Lessee">We</fex>  ve been <t>renting</t> from him for years .</ex>', 'The FE #Goods is an item which is temporarily exchanged for #Money in a transaction. 
<ex>I tried to <t>hire</t> <fex name="Goods">a bicycle</fex> .</ex>', 'The means by which a commercial transaction occurs.
<ex> Will they allow you to <t>lease</t> the airfield <fex name="Mns">by check</fex>? </ex>', '#Money is the thing given in exchange for tempory use of the #Goods.
<ex>Sam <t>chartered</t> the ship <fex name="Money">for only $12,000</fex>.</ex>', 'In isome cases, price or payment is described per unit of #Goods.
<ex> Jon <t>rented</t> a car for <fex name="Rate">twenty dollars a day</fex> . </ex>', 'The individual who has permanent ownership of the #Goods and allows them to be used by the Lessee temporarily.

<ex>Kim and Pat <t>rent</t> the apartment <fex name="Lessor">from Jess</fex>. </ex>', 'This FE is any unit in which goods or services can be measured.
Generally, it occurs in a <ment>by</ment>-PP. 
<ex>Lee <t>rents</t> rooms <fex name="Unit">by the hour</fex>. </ex>', 'The location the renting takes place.

<ex>I <t>rented</t> the car <fex name="Place">right next to the airport</fex> .</ex>', 'The purpose for which the renting is performed.

<ex>Though he was already wanted , he <t>rented</t> a car <fex name="Purpose">to make a getaway</fex> .</ex>', 'When the event occurs.', 'Any description of the purchasing event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Lessee that affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>). <ex>She quit her old job and <fex name="Manner">gleefully</fex> <t>leased</t> a cheap, Upper East Side apartment.</ex>', 'The length of time that the #Goods are (or have been) in the #Lessee s possession.  

<ex>Our neighbors have been <t>renting</t> their house <fex name="Duration">for the last ten years</fex>.</ex>']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The #Lessee has #Money and wants the #Goods.
<ex>Lee <t>rented</t> a textbook <fex name="Lessee">to Abby</fex>.</ex>', 'The FE #Goods is the item which is temporarily exchanged for #Money. 
<ex>Kim <t>rented</t> <fex name="Goods">the shed</fex> out .</ex>', 'The #Lessor has possession of the #Goods and temporarily exchanges them for #Money from a #Lessee.
<ex>So far, <fex name="Lessor">my company</fex> has <t>rented</t> the video more than three million times .</ex>', 'The means by which a commercial transaction occurs.
<ex>Abby <t>rented</t> her room <fex name="Means">by putting an ad in the Examiner</fex>.</ex>', 'Money is the thing given in exchange for Goods in a transaction.
<ex>The x-ray machine was <t>leased</t> <fex name="Money">for $12,000</fex> to a small firm in Menlo Park .</ex>', 'In some cases, price or payment is described per unit of #Goods.
<ex> The hostel <t>rents</t> a bunk <fex name="Rate">for about 20 dollars a night</fex> .</ex>', 'This FE is any unit in which goods or services can be measured.
Generally, it occurs in a <ment>by</ment>-PP. 
<ex>Bob <t>rents</t> rooms <fex name="Unit">by the hour</fex>. </ex>', 'The location where the leasing takes place.

<ex>U-haul <t>rents</t> <fex name="Place">almost everywhere</fex>.</ex>', 'The purpose for which an intentional act is performed.', 'The time at which the renting takes place.', 'Any description of the renting event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Lessor that affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).
<ex>Stuart <fex name="Manner">reluctantly</fex> <t>rented</t> her his last apartment .</ex>', 'The length of time that the #Goods are (or have been) in the #Lessee s possession.   

<ex>Our neighbors have <t>rented</t> their house out <fex name="Duration">for the last ten years</fex>.</ex>']

descriptions:
['The #Speaker is the person who communicates their cessation of association with the #Content.', 'The idea that the #Speaker no longer associates with, whether it be an activity, a propostion, or a group.

<ex>Bonnie Charlie then <t>renounced</t> <fex name="con">his aspirations to the throne</fex>.</ex>', '#Medium is the physical entity or channel used by the #Speaker to transmit the statement of renunciation.

<ex>Castro <t>renounced</t> all involvement with the group <fex name="med">over the radio</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Addressee is the person to whom the #Speaker is communicating. When this FE is expressed, it often appears in a prepositional phrase introduced by "to", or as a direct object.', 'Any description of the renunciation which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Speaker that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>). 

<ex>Your government then <fex name="man">coldly and completely</fex> <t>renounced</t> you.</ex>', 'An act whereby the #Speaker makes a statement of renunciation.', 'The time when the statement is made.', 'The FE specifies the place where the statement takes place.']

descriptions: ['The #Injured_party was affected by some previous wrongful act of the #Wrongdoer and who should benefit from the reparations.', 'The #Injury is the injurious action that  the #Wrongdoer committed against the #Injured_party.  Although conceptually present, this FE need not always be realized.', 'The #Wrongdoer makes amends to the #Injured_party for the #Injury.', 'The #Benefiting_action is performed by the #Wrongdoer to make amends.', 'It identifies the entity that the #Wrongdoer gives to the #Injured_party.', "It marks any description of the #Wrongdoer's making of reparations not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification, (e.g. probably), and general descriptions comparing events (e.g. the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of a #Wrongdoer that also affect the action ( e.g. presumptuously). ", 'It identifies the #Place where the #Wrongdoer makes amends.', 'It identifies the #Time when amends are made.', 'It identifies the #Purpose for which the #Wrongdoer makes restitution to the #Injured_party.', 'The extent to which the #Wrongdoer makes amends for the #Injury.', nan]

descriptions:
['The person who is owed #Money by the #Debtor.

<ex>If you borrow, you ll have to <t>repay</t> <fex name="Loaner">the bank</fex></ex>', 'The person who is giving #Money to the #Loaner to return an earlier borrowed amount.

<ex><fex name="Debtor">I</fex> <t>paid</t> Johnson <t>back</t> for the movie ticket.</ex>', 'The amount of #Money that the #Debtor gives to the #Loaner, which may or may not be the full amount of the #Loan.

<ex><t>Pay</t> me ba<t></t>ck <fex name="Money">my 20 dollars</fex>!</ex>', 'A situation or a representative of a situation prior to repayment in which the #Debtor uses the #Loaner s money.

<ex>You must <t>repay</t> <fex name="Loan">the mortgage</fex> in full.</ex>', 'The level to which the Loan can be considered repaid in its entirety.

<ex>He wishes to <fex name="Degree">completely</fex> <t>repay</t> the loan.</ex>', 'When the #Debtor gives the #Loaner money.

<ex>Don t worry, I ll <t>pay</t> you <t>back</t> <fex name="Time">later</fex>.</ex>', 'How the #Debtor gives #Money to the #Loaner.

<ex>Paul <fex name="Manner">quietly</fex> <t>repaid</t> all of his debts and skipped town.</ex>', 'The physical location where the repayment takes place.

<ex>They <t>repaid</t> Lenny <fex name="Place">in a dark alleyway</fex>.</ex>', 'What the <fex name="">Debtor</fex> does in order to repay the <fex name="">Loaner</fex>.

<ex>I <t>repaid</t> my loan by mowing their lawn once a week.</ex>']
classificationExplanation: FEs indicate properties: Value, Extent, Degree; applies to an Entity or Holder.; Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The  <fex name="Enemy">Enemy</fex> is the entity that fails to overtake the #Defender.

<ex>General Monk would <t>repel</t> <fex name="Enemy">Jacobite invaders</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Defender is the land, government, and its people that the #Enemy fails to seize.

<ex><fex name="Defender">General Winter</fex> <t>repelled</t> invaders from Napoleon to Hitler.</ex>', 'This FE refers to the #Invasion_act perpetrated by the #Enemy.

<ex><fex name="Defender">Spain</fex> pledged to <t>repel</t> <fex name="Invasion_act">any Allied invasion</fex>.</ex>', 'This FE describes the intensity and extent of the repelling event.', 'The manner in which the #Defender repels the #Enemy.', 'The action by which the repelling event is made possible through the efforts of the #Defender.', 'The location where the #Defender repels the #Enemy.', 'The #Time when the #Defender succeeds to repel the #Enemy.', 'The tool used by the #Defender to repel the #Enemy.']
classificationExplanation: FEs indicate properties: Value, Extent, Degree; applies to an Entity or Holder.; Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The conscious entity, generally a person, that performs actions resulting in the #New entity occupying the position.', 'The #New entity is the person or thing that the #Agent sets to fill a #Role.

<ex>I don t know; perhaps you could <t>substitute</t> <fex name="New">regular sugar</fex>.</ex>', 'The entity that formerly occupied the position.

<ex>If you <t>substitute</t> a 15" arm <fex name="old">for the 50cm one</fex>, it works pretty well.</ex>
<ex>Please <t>replace</t> <fex name="old">the broken fixture</fex> as soon as possible.</ex>', 'An intentional action performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the replacement.', 'This FE identifies where the #Agent installs the #New entity.', 'This FE identifies the purpose for which an #Agent places the #New entity in a position.', 'This FE identifies the time when the #Agent installs the New entity.', 'Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification  secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics or states of an #Agent that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously</ment>, <ment>coldly</ment>, <ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>, <ment>carefully</ment>).', 'The category that the #New and #Old entities fit into as a result of the function they serve.

<ex>AN AUSTRALIAN state has proposed the country adopt a bill of rights and <t>replace</t> the Queen <fex name="rol">as head of state</fex> with an Australian president .</ex>']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; Core FEs: State, Condition; describes static situations; lacks Goal or Result.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions: ['The #Informer reports the activities of the #Wrongdoer to the #Authorities.', 'The #Wrongdoer has his or her activities reported to the #Authorities.', 'The #Authorities are the officials, government or otherwise, who handle misbehavior.', 'The #Behavior is the action or actions for which the #Wrongdoer is reported.', 'The #Time when the #Informer reports the #Behavior of the #Wrongdoer.', 'The #Place is the location where the reporting occurs.']
classificationExplanation: FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions: ['The #Representative speaks for another.', 'The #Origin is the place where the #Representative was born or lived a salient part of her or his life.', 'The #Age is the length of time the #Representative has been alive.', 'The #Ethnicity is the religious, racial, national, socio-economic or cultural group to which the #Representative belongs.', '#Rank is the position in a hierarchy that a #Representative occupies within an organization.', 'This FE identifies the Place where the #Representative works.', 'The #Represented authorizes the #Representative to communicate on its behalf.', 'This FE identifies the #Type of #Representative.', 'The #Compensation is the payment that the #Representative receives for performing a task.', 'The #Contract_basis describes the conditions of employment with respect to permanency, hours per time period, or payment basis.\n\n<ex>Smithers is a <fex name="cb">half-time</fex> <t>spokesperson</t> for Procteur et Gamble </ex>']
classificationExplanation: Core FEs: State, Condition; describes static situations; lacks Goal or Result.

descriptions:
['The event, idea, or emotion evoked by the #Entity.', 'An object that has some association with a #Phenomenon.', 'This FE describes the #Degree to which the #Entity represents the #Phenomenon.

<ex><fex name="Entity">That mural</fex> <t>is</t> <fex name="Degree">hardly</fex> <t>a symbol</t> <fex name="Phenomenon">of what we re all about!</fex></ex>', 'The time period in which the representing occurs.', 'This FE describes the means through which the representing occurs.
<ex><fex name="Phenomenon">What</fex> does <fex name="Entity">a black and white snake</fex> <t>symbolize</t> <fex name="Means">in a dream</fex>?</ex>', 'The #Cognizer is the person or group of people who believe in the representation.', 'The #Place where the representing event occurs.']
classificationExplanation: FEs indicate properties: Value, Extent, Degree; applies to an Entity or Holder.; Focuses on discrete items (Entity, Object); lacks dynamic roles.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The #Speaker, as in other communication frames, is generally an External Argument. 

<ex><fex name="Speaker">The judge</fex> <t>ordered</t> the plaintiff to return the money.</ex>', 'In this frame the #Addressee can either occur as an NP Object (usually with a following complement clause) or as a PP Complement of verbs or nouns.

<ex>The child <t>implored</t> <fex name="Addressee">her parents</fex> to let her stay up late.</ex>
<ex>I <t>pleaded</t> <fex name="Addressee">with the bus driver</fex> to let me on without paying.</ex>
<ex>I made an <t>appeal</t> <fex name="Addressee">to the passers-by</fex> to help me.</ex>', 'The #Message is the content of the request that can be expressed as a quote, in a finite or non-finite clausal Complement, an NP Object or PP Complement.
<ex><fex name="Message">"I d like an extension,"</fex> <t>begged</t> Pat.</ex>
<ex>The directors <t>requested</t> <fex name="Message">that Pat resign</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Pat <t>begged</t> them <fex name="Message">to reconsider</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The students <t>requested</t> <fex name="Message">an extension of the deadline</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The offender <t>begged</t> <fex name="Message">for clemency</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Medium is the physical entity or channel used to transmit the #Message. The #Medium is frequently expressed as a PP Complement headed by <ment>on</ment> or <ment>in</ment>. 
<ex>The parents of the missing child made an <t>appeal</t> <fex name="Medium">on television</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The parents of the missing child made an <t>appeal</t> <fex name="Medium">in the papers</fex>.</ex>', '#Manner indicates the manner in which the #Message is delivered.

<ex>Don t stop, " he <t>commanded</t> <fex name="Manr">huskily</fex>.</ex>
<ex>"Maybe that was the basic problem," she <t>told</t> him <fex name="Manr">wearily</fex>.</ex>', 'An act performed by the #Speaker that results in a request being made and received.

<ex>He <t>asked</t> for food <fex name="Mns">by holding his hand out with a doleful expression</fex>.</ex>', 'The interval during which the #Speaker makes the request.

<ex><fex name="Speaker">I</fex> <t>urged</t> <fex name="Add">him</fex> <fex name="Message">to concede</fex> <fex name="Time">yesterday</fex>.</ex>']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The #Customer is the person or business ordering the #Entity from the #Supplier.

<ex><fex name="Cust">Simone</fex> <t>ordered</t> a hamburger and fries.</ex>', 'The object ordered by the #Customer.

<ex>Liz <t>ordered</t> <fex name="Ent">a new espresso maker</fex> for the office.</ex>

<ex>His <t><fex name="Ent">order</fex></t> did not arrive on time.</ex>', 'The person or organization from whom the #Customer orders the #Entity.

<ex>Mrs. Apfelbaum <t>ordered</t> a coffee <fex name="S">from the barista</fex>.</ex>', 'The channel used by the #Customer to transmit the request.

<ex>Harold <t>ordered</t> the material <fex name="Med">via email</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Time at which the #Customer requested the #Entity.

<ex>Sara placed the <t>order</t> <fex name="Time">three days ago</fex>. </ex>', 'The Manner in which the request is placed.

<ex>Mr. Shaw <fex name="Man">hastily</fex> <t>ordered</t> the first thing he saw on the menu.</ex>', 'An action performed by the #Customer that results in a request being made.

<ex>Cheri accidently <t>ordered</t> the jacket <fex name="Means">by clicking on the link</fex>.</ex>']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; Focuses on discrete items (Entity, Object); lacks dynamic roles.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The state-of-affairs which prevents #Negative_consequences.', 'An event or state of affairs that results if the required #Required_situation does not occur and which impacts some deprofiled entity in a way that the speaker finds undesirable.', 'The event or state of affairs that is achieved by bringing about the #Required_situation and which entails the non-occurrance of #Negative_consequences.', 'The period during which the #Required_situation is necessary to prevent negative consequences.

<ex>He was told that <fex name="tim">when he got back</fex> , his column <t>needed</t> a serious rethink .</ex>', 'The location within which the #Required_situation is required.

<ex><fex name="pla">In California</fex> , seatbelts <t>must</t> be fastened at all times .</ex>', 'The degree to which the #Required_situation is necessary.  The #Degree may either imply a modification of the direness of the #Negative_consequences, the probability of the #Negative_consequences (if the #Required_situation is not made to hold), or both.

<ex>He <fex name="deg">absolutely</fex> <t>must</t> be replaced .</ex>', 'Manner']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs indicate properties: Value, Extent, Degree; applies to an Entity or Holder.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.; Core FEs: State, Condition; describes static situations; lacks Goal or Result.; Describes temporal unfolding or phases (start, ongoing, end); FEs like Stage, Duration.

descriptions: ['The state-of-affairs which cannot hold without the #Requirement.', 'The state-of-affairs that must be present or obtain in order for the #Dependent to obtain.', 'An entity that has to be present for the #Dependent state of affairs to obtain', 'The extent to which the #Dependent depends on the presence of the #Requirement.', 'The time at which the #Requirement is necessary for the #Dependent.', '#Place denotes a location in which the specified relation between #Requirement and #Dependent holds.', 'The individual in whose interest it is to have the #Required_entity or for the #Requirement state of affairs to obtain.', 'An individual that has to provide the #Required_entity or see to it that the #Requirement state of affairs holds.']
classificationExplanation: FEs indicate properties: Value, Extent, Degree; applies to an Entity or Holder.; Core FEs: State, Condition; describes static situations; lacks Goal or Result.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The sentient being who rescues the #Patient or #Asset from the #Harmful_situation.

<ex><fex name="Agent">He</fex> <t>rescued</t> the innocent girl from a fate worse than death. </ex>', 'The living being who is rescued by the #Agent.

<ex><fex name="Patient">Three foxes</fex> were <t>saved</t> from being savagely ripped apart.</ex>', 'The entity that is judged to be valueable which might be lost or damaged by the #Harmful_situation.

<ex>She <t>saved</t> <fex name="Asset">countless lives</fex> during her short stay on the plantation.</ex>', 'An event that occurs which could result in injury or harm to the #Patient or #Asset.

<ex>Three foxes were <t>saved</t> <fex name="Harm">from being savagely ripped apart</fex>.</ex>', 'The time at which the #Agent rescues the #Patient or #Asset.

<ex>She <t>saved</t> my life on the bridge <fex name="Time">yesterday</fex>.</ex>', 'The way in which the #Agent rescues the #Patient or #Asset.

<ex>Kevin informed her that he would <fex name="Manner">happily</fex> <t>save</t> her, given the opportunity.</ex>', 'The location at which the #Agent rescues the #Patient or #Asset.

<ex>She <t>saved</t> my life <fex name="Place">on the bridge</fex> yesterday.</ex>', 'The tool with which the #Agent saves the #Patient or #Asset.

<ex>She <t>saved</t> my life <fex name="Instrument">with her words</fex>.</ex>', 'The means by which the #Agent rescues the #Patient or #Asset.

<ex>The nurse <t>saved</t> my life <fex name="Means">by performing CPR</fex>.</ex>', 'The purpose for which the #Agent rescues the #Patient or #Asset.

<ex>You know he only <t>saved</t> the dog <fex name="Purpose">to get close to Miranda</fex>.</ex>', 'The extent to which the #Patient or #Asset is actually saved.

<ex>He <fex name="Degree">wholly</fex> <t>saved</t> the town from hunger.</ex>']
classificationExplanation: FEs indicate properties: Value, Extent, Degree; applies to an Entity or Holder.; Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The people engaged in a research endeavor.

<ex>Before he became an astronaut, <fex name="res">Grunsfeld</fex> <m>did</m> <t>research</t> in physics. </ex>', 'A significant unanswered open proposition which the #Researcher is attempting to resolve.

<ex>When we have <t>researched</t> <fex name="que">why Brazilian mothers have stopped breastfeeding</fex>, principal reasons given are  poor milk  and  insufficient milk  .</ex>', 'A phenomenon or idea involved in a #Question.

<ex>Would you take part in <t>research</t> <fex name="top">on the best place to have a baby</fex>? </ex>', 'An area of inquiry.

<ex></ex>', 'The time when  the research is carried out.

<ex><fex name="tim">During summer of 1999</fex>, I did <t>research</t> using a technique called "Path Integral Monte
Carlo", to simulate quantum particles.</ex>', 'The experimentations, observations, or other procedures performed by the #Researcher in order to find an answer to the #Question.

<ex>The workgroup has <t>researched</t> this issue <fex name="mea">by reviewing the basin plans of other regions and other various sources</fex>.</ex>', 'Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of the Researcher that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully). 

<ex>The West Chicago Park District <fex name="man">carefully</fex> <t>researched</t> how much of an increase was
needed to accomplish all of our goals.</ex>', '#Purpose indicates an action that the #Researcher intends to accomplish by performing research.

<ex>We <t>research</t> this fungus <fex name="pur">to fight ailments in tobacco and tomato fields</fex>.</ex>', 'The physical place where the research is carried out.

<ex>Johnson and Randall s <t>research</t> <fex name="pla">in Africa</fex> has proven extremely valuable.</ex>']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; Core FEs: State, Condition; describes static situations; lacks Goal or Result.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The entity that contacts the #Organization about retainment of #Services.', 'The goods or labor that the #Client requests the #Organization preserve for future consumption or rendering.', 'The entity that enters into its records the request of the #Client to retain #Services in the future.', 'The link between the #Client and #Organization, e.g. a travel agent.', 'Scheduled_time', '<def-root>The future point in time when the <fen>Client</fen> arranges for the <fen>Organization</fen> to provide <fen>Services</fen>.

<ex>She <t>reserved</t> the room for the meeting <fex name="Scheduled_time">for Tuesday</fex> .</ex></def-root>', 'Manner', 'Any description of the event as a whole ("the same way") or a characteristic of the #Booker during the action that holistically affects the event ("sloppily").', 'The location the #Booker performs the action.', 'The situation that the #Booker intends to bring about by reserving.', 'An action or methodology used by the #Booker to bring the reservation about.', 'The time at which the reserving event takes place.

<ex>I booked the room for Monday <fex name="Time">only on Tuesday</fex> .</ex>']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The #Deformer is the one who does the reshaping.

<ex><fex name="Def">The lieutenant</fex> <t>crushed</t> it angrily with his boot before looking back at Hencke.</ex>', 'The #Patient is the entity acted on and that undergoes a change.  <ex>Jack plucked the flower out of his morning coat and closed his fist slowly over it , <t>crushing</t> <fex name="Patient">it</fex> into a pulp.</ex>', 'The #Cause is an animate or inanimate entity, a force, or event that produces an effect. Volitionality is not a necessary characteristic of #Causes.  <ex><fex name="Cause">The strong winds</fex> <t>deformed</t> the structure of the outhouse.</ex> <ex><fex name="Cause">The rockslide</fex> <t>squashed</t> our summer villa.</ex>', 'A state that holds of the #Patient or a relation that holds among the constituent parts of the #Patient as a result of the arranging action.', 'This FE identifies the #Instrument with which the #Deformer affects the #Patient.  <ex>The lieutenant <t>crushed</t> it angrily <fex name="Ins">with his boot</fex> before looking back at Hencke.</ex>', 'The FE #Manner identifies the manner in which an #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.  <ex>The lieutenant <t>crushed</t> it <fex name="Mnr">angrily</fex> with his boot before looking back at Hencke.</ex>', 'The FE #Means identifies the means by which the #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.', 'The #Place indicates where the #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.', 'The FE #Time identifies when the #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.  <ex>The lieutenant <t>crushed</t> it angrily with his boot <fex name="Time">before looking back at Hencke</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Resistant_surface is the surface against which a #Deformer presses the #Patient.  <ex>Michael <t>flattened</t> the can <fex name="Res_surf">against his head</fex> . </ex> <ex>She <t>crushed</t> her cigarette <fex name="Res_surf">in the ashtray</fex> and stood up to go.</ex>', 'The #Locus is the locus of the reshaping action; it is essentially a simultaneous #Instrument and #Resistant_surface.

<ex>Russell <t>crumpled</t> the paper cups <fex name="Locus">in his fist</fex>.</ex>', 'The degree to which the #Patient is reshaped. <ex>The steamroller <t>flattened</t> my shoes <fex name="Degr">completely</fex>.</ex>']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs indicate properties: Value, Extent, Degree; applies to an Entity or Holder.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.; Involves topological/kinesthetic primitives: Path, Container, Force.; Core FEs: State, Condition; describes static situations; lacks Goal or Result.

descriptions:
['The individual(s) that reside at the #Location.

<ex><fex name="Res">Hannah</fex> <t>lives</t> in San Francisco.</ex>', 'The place in which somebody resides.

<ex><fex name="Res">Sue</fex>  <t>lives</t> <fex name="Location">in Berkeley</fex>.</ex>', 'A person or group of people that the resident is staying with or among.\n\n<ex><fex name="Res">Boris</fex> still <t>lives</t> <fex name="Co_resident">with his parents</fex>.</ex>', 'Manner of performing an action', 'An act of the #Resident that enables them to reside in the #Location.

<ex>He <t>dwelt</t> in the wild for years <fex name="Means">by foraging nuts and berries and occasionally stealing</fex>.</ex>', 'This FE refers to the #Time when the #Resident resides.']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions: ['The #Agent finds the solution or explanation to the outstanding mystery or #Problem.', 'The #Problem is the predicament or mystery that is resolved.', 'The #Cause is the non-Agentive event or state of affairs that brings about the resolution of the #Problem.', 'The #Means is an intermediate action taken by the #Agent in order to resolve the #Problem.', 'It indicates the #Time at which the #Problem is resolved.', 'It indicates the location at which the #Problem is resolved.', 'The #Degree to which the #Agent or #Cause resolves the problem.', 'Any description of the resolution, such as secondary effects (quietly) or comparisons of events (the same way). In agentive cases,  #Manner may also describe salient characteristics of the #Agent which affect the action.(carefully, diligently, deliberately etc. )', 'The #Instrument is an entity used for resolving the #Problem.', 'It identifies the length of time taken to resolve a #Problem.', 'It identifies the physical or abstract setting in which the #Problem is resolved.', 'The state of affairs that the #Agent is trying to bring about by solving the #Problem in the specified way.']
classificationExplanation: FEs indicate properties: Value, Extent, Degree; applies to an Entity or Holder.; Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; Core FEs: State, Condition; describes static situations; lacks Goal or Result.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The #Speaker is the person who communicates the reply or response. 

<ex><fex name="Speaker">Iran</fex> on Saturday <t>rejected</t> Europe s proposal for ending the standoff over Tehran s nuclear program.</ex>', 'This is the person who made the #Proposal to the #Speaker and to whom the #Speaker communicates  their response. This frame element stands in for the #Proposal and is only licensed when the #Proposal  can be understood from the context.

<ex>But senior SLN officials had <t>rebuffed</t> <fex name="int">the man who is ever so willing to please
the guerrillas</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Proposal is the prior communication or action to which a response is given.

<ex>Dr. Carolyn Herrington has <t>accepted</t> <fex name="pro">our offer to become Dean of the College of Education</fex> .</ex>', 'As with #Medium in other Communication frames, the physical entity or channel used to communicate can be expressed, usually as a PP Complement headed by "on" or "in".', 'Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including  secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may indicate salient characteristics of the Speaker that affect the action (<ment>presumptuously</ment>, <ment>coldly</ment>, <ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>).

<ex>Moreover, as with Surrey, myths have proliferated, such as that Oxford <fex name="Manr">cruelly</fex> <t>rejected</t> his wife in 1576.</ex>', 'This FE identifies the #Means by the #Speaker responds to the #Proposal .  <ex>Others, I would say have actually <t>turned</t> me <t>down</t> <fex name="Mns">by not replying and not responding</fex>.</ex>', 'The location in which the #Speaker  makes a verbal response.


<ex>Legislation that would have required smaller school districts to share administrators has been <t>rebuffed</t> repeatedly <fex name="pla">in the Oklahoma House of Representatives</fex>.</ex>', 'The time interval during which the #Speaker makes their verbal response.

<ex>This must make <fex name="tim">yesterday s</fex> Taliban <t>rebuff</t> all the more wounding.</ex>', 'An action that the #Speaker intends to accomplish by making a verbal response.

<ex>He was asked to join the National Assembly ruling party, but repeatedly <t>turned</t>
them <t>down</t> <fex name="pur">in order to continue his work as a journalist</fex>.</ex>', '#Role denotes the capacity in which the #Interlocutor is judged.

<ex>The Policy Committee had
<t>rejected</t> her <fex name="rol">as a candidate for chronic dialysis</fex> because of her young age. .</ex>']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; Core FEs: State, Condition; describes static situations; lacks Goal or Result.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['A non-agentive entity that is impinged upon by a #Trigger event to which they respond.

<ex><fex name="res_e">This plastic</fex> <t>responds</t> well to pressure.</ex>', 'An event that impinges upon the #Agent or #Responding_entity and produces a #Response from it.

<ex> How has the modern welfare state <t>responded</t> <fex name="tri">to the needs of working class women</fex>, and why? </ex>', 'The intentional #Agent that is impinged upon by a #Trigger event to which they respond.

<ex>Once again <fex name="age">the Government</fex> is <t>responding</t> to a crisis with measures that will only harm patients</ex>', 'The means action whereby the #Agent responds to the Trigger.

<ex>The diocese <t>responded</t> <fex name="res">by taking the property</fex></ex>', 'The point in time when the #Agent or #Responding_entity manifests its #Response to the #Trigger .  <ex>Israel <t>responded</t> <fex name="Time">yesterday</fex> to the killing of 22 people by Palestinian suicide bombers with a helicopter attack</ex>', 'A characterization of the #Responding_entity, #Agent, or their #Response action.

<ex>The government agencies <t>responded</t> <fex name="man">slowly</fex> and without much effort.</ex>', 'The location in which the #Response action takes place.

<ex>The auto industry has <t>responded</t> <fex name="Place">in the U.S., but particularly in Asian and European markets</fex> by manufacturing an entry-level segment of cars that is more appealing, better looking, and safer than in the past.</ex>', 'An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by performing the #Response action.']

descriptions: ['A non-agentive entity that is impinged upon by a #Trigger event to which they respond.', 'An event that impinges upon the #Agent or #Responding_entity and produces a #Response from it.', 'The means action whereby the #Agent responds to the #Trigger.', 'The intentional #Agent that is impinged upon by a #Trigger event to which they respond.', 'A characterization of the #Responding_entity, #Agent, or their #Response action.', 'The location in which the #Response action takes place.', 'An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by performing the #Response action.', 'The point in time when the #Agent or #Responding_entity manifests its #Response to the #Trigger .']

descriptions: ['The #Agent performs the intentional act.', 'This FE identifies the #Act that the #Agent performs intentionally.', 'This FE identifies the place where the intentional act occurs.', 'This FE identifies the time when the #Agent acts intentionally.', 'The degree to which the #Agent bears responsibility for performing the #Act.\n\n<ex>She was <fex name="deg">entirely</fex> <t>responsible</t> for the prank.</ex>']

descriptions:
['A #Part of a larger #Whole that has been mentioned in prior discourse or is available in the discourse setting.


<ex>the GP had stipulated counselling as a <t>complement</t> <fex name="Part">to medication</fex></ex>', 'The previously unmentioned part of the #Whole.


<ex>You should try to persuade the <t><fex name="Rest">rest</fex></t> of the family to do so whatever their personal opinions</ex>', 'The larger entitiy or group that is fully made up of the #Part and the #Rest.']
classificationExplanation: Insufficient clues from FEs or descriptions.

descriptions: ['The #Agent makes an attempt to achieve a #Goal.', 'The #Goal is what the #Agent attempts to achieve.', 'A participant function in a particular event or in events of a particular kind.', 'This FE identifies the means by which the #Goal is achieved (or not).', 'This FE identifies the #Time when the attempt succeeds or fails.', 'The place where an attempt succeeds or fails..', 'This FE is applied to expressions which indicate the prevailing physical conditions for the event, or some concurrent states of affairs.', 'The extent to which the #Action succeeds or fails.']

descriptions: ['The being or entity that becomes living again.\n\n<ex>If <fex name="pro">the Lord</fex> <t>resurrected</t> in three days, surely he could relieve my back pain in, say, a week.</ex>', 'The time at which the resurrection occurs.', 'The location at which the #Protagonist returns from the dead.']

descriptions:
['The person who has possession of the #Theme.

<ex>At all times <fex name="Agent">the Saxon government</fex> <t>held</t> <t>on</t> <t>to</t> its insistently practiced political tradition. </ex>', 'The entity which the #Agent possesses for a #Duration.

<ex>Once you ve got a War Bond, <t>hang</t> <t>on</t> <t>to</t> <fex name="Theme">it</fex> for the full ten years of its life.</ex>', 'The amount of time for which the #Agent is in possession of the #Theme.

<ex>The man who hates his life will <t>keep</t> it <fex name="Dur">for eternal life</fex>.</ex>', 'The location where the #Agent keeps the #Theme.

<ex>He will <t>retain</t> <fex name="Place">in his heart</fex> the memory of the vast Holocaust.</ex>', 'The way the #Agent retains possession of the #Theme.

<ex>I knew these gifts were not meant to be <t>kept</t> <fex name="Man">selfishly</fex>.</ex>', 'The time at which the #Agent has possession of the #Theme.

<ex>Margerite <t>held</t> <t>on</t> <t>to</t> the key <fex name="Time">on Wednesday</fex> until I returned to pick it up.</ex>', 'The means by which the #Agent retains the #Theme.

<ex>If Britian had focused on India, could it have <t>retained</t> it <fex name="Means">by force</fex>?</ex>']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The #Speaker is the sentient entity that reveals  the #Information (whether spoken or written). 

<ex><fex name="spe">Kornfeldt</fex> <t>revealed</t> that he had embezzled more than twice the amount his company owned.</ex>', 'The #Information is the FE that identifies the content of what the #Speaker is revealing to the #Addressee.  It can be expressed as a clause or as a noun phrase.

<ex>You shouldn t <t>reveal</t> <fex name="inf">any murders you ve been involved in</fex>, if you know what I mean.</ex>', 'The #Topic is the subject matter about which the #Speaker is speaking. It normally only appears with noun targets, or in special constructions.

<ex><t>Revelations</t> <fex name="top">about the coming of the Christ</fex> surfaced in early Mediaeval times.</ex>', '#Medium is the physical entity or channel used by the #Speaker to transmit the statement.
<ex>Kim <t>confided</t> in me <fex name="Medium">over the phone</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Addressee is the person to whom the #Information is revealed. 

<ex>Evelyn <t>confessed</t> <fex name="add">to Barney Holesum</fex> about what had happened.</ex>
<ex>An unknown intern in the White House <t>leaked</t> the "lunch menu" <fex name="add">to the press</fex>.</ex>', 'Any description of the revelation which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (<ment>probably</ment>, <ment>presumably</ment>, <ment>mysteriously</ment>), secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Speaker that also affect the revelation (<ment>presumptuously</ment>, <ment>coldly</ment>, <ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>, <ment>carefully</ment>, <ment>maliciously</ment>).', 'The degree to which #Information is revealed.

<ex>When she confessed, she confessed <fex name="com">completely</fex>.</ex>', 'An act whereby the #Speaker makes a revelation.
<ex>He <t>revealed</t> his true feelings about the matter <fex name="mea">by giving her the thumbs-up behind his back</fex>.</ex>', 'The time when the revelation is made.', 'The FE specifies the place where the #Information is revealed.

<ex>According to the report, he <t>confessed</t> to eating onions and gargling with generic mouthwash <fex name="pla">at the station</fex>.</ex>']

descriptions:
['The #Avenger exacts revenge from the #Offender for the #Injury.

<ex> <fex name="Avenger">We</fex> want to <t>avenge</t> her. </ex>', 'The #Offender has committed the earlier #Injury for which the #Avenger seeks revenge.

<ex>Jo had the affair as a kind of <t>revenge</t> <fex name="Offender">against Pat</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Marie took terrible <t>revenge</t> <fex name="Offender">on Trevor</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Avenger carries out a #Punishment in order to exact revenge on the #Offender.

<ex>The team took <t>revenge</t> <fex name="Punishment">with a resounding victory</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Injury is the injurious action committed by the #Offender against the #Injured_Party. This Frame Element need not always be realized, although it is conceptually necessary. 

<ex>The team sought <t>revenge</t> <fex name="Injury">for their 4-1 defeat last month</fex>.</ex>', 'This frame element identifies the constituent that encodes who or what suffered the #Injury at the hands of the #Offender. Sometimes, an abstract concept such a person s honour or their blood is presented as the element that has suffered the #Injury. These also constitute instances of  #Injured_party 

<ex>Sam s brothers <t>avenged</t> <fex name="Injured_party">him</fex>.</ex>
<ex>We will decide later how to <t>avenge</t> <fex name="Injured_party">the blood of the fallen</fex>.</ex>', 'This FE identifies the #Degree to which an event occurs.
<ex>Marie took <fex name="Degree">terrible</fex> <t>revenge</t> on Trevor.</ex>', 'This FE identifies the #Instrument with which the revenge is performed.', 'This frame element refers to the #Manner in which the #Avenger exacts their revenge from the #Offender.

<ex>They took <fex name="Manner">brutal</fex> <t>revenge</t> on the criminal.</ex>', 'This FE identifies the #Place where the revenge occurs.', 'This FE identifies the #Purpose for which the revenge is performed.', 'This FE identifies the #Time when the revenge occurs.', 'The length of time that the #Avenger seeks revenge for the #Injury.']

descriptions:
['The individual or group within a society that overturns the #Current_leadership.', 'The people currently in power, whom the #Agent attempts to overthrow.

<ex>She fomented <t>revolution</t> <fex name="curl">against the Romans</fex>.</ex>', 'The currently-existing system of authority or government.

<ex><t>Toppling</t> <fex name="curo">the capitalist government</fex> was their first goal.</ex>', 'The location of the revolution.

<ex>A series of <t>revolutions</t> <fex name="pla">in the eastern part of the continent</fex> made long-distance travel all but impossible.</ex>', 'The time when the revolution takes place.

<ex>China s <fex name="tim">20th-century</fex> <t>revolutions</t> have yet to have their full impact on global politics.</ex>', 'The means by which the revolution is carried out.

<ex>The infantry launched an <fex name="mea">armed</fex> <t>mutiny</t> over low pay and poor living conditions.</ex>', 'The degree to which the #Agent defeats and removes the #Current_leadership or removes the #Current_order.

<ex>After years of back-and-forth fighting it seems unlikely that they will ever <fex name="deg">decisively</fex> <t>overthrow</t> the current regime.</ex>', 'A description of the #Agent or revolution not covered by more specific FEs.

<ex>Ten years later, after another jail sentence, he led the Civil Forum movement to victory in Czechoslovakia s <fex name="man">peaceful</fex> <t>revolution</t>.</ex>']

descriptions:
['#Evaluee is the person or thing about whom/which a judgment has made and to whom reward/punishment is dealt. With verbs, the #Evaluee is typically expressed as Object.
<ex>The boss <t>rewarded</t> <fex name="Eval">you</fex> for your diligence.</ex>', 'Typically, there is a constituent expressing the #Reason for the #Agent s judgment. It is usually a  for -PP, e.g. <ex>I <t>punished</t> him <fex name="Reas">for his impudence</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Agent is the person doing the rewarding or punishing.
<ex><fex name="Agt">Jake s</fex> <t>rewards</t> to his best workers were very generous.</ex>', 'The reward or punishment given to the #Evaluee by the #Agent.
<ex>If a person be guilty of impiety let him be <t>punished</t> <fex name="Action">with death</fex>.</ex>', '#Manner of performing the reward or punishment.', 'The action that is taken that results in punishement/reward.
<ex>His parents <t>disciplined</t> him <fex name="Mns">by taking away his toys</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The Bar Association <t>rewarded</t> her <fex name="Mns">by hosting a lunch in her honor</fex>.</ex>', 'Where the event takes place.', 'When the event occurs.', 'The #Instrument with which the reward or punishment is carried out.', 'The #Purpose of the reward or punishment.', '#Degree of reward or punishment.', 'Depictive']

descriptions: ['The #Theme is the entity which moves by means of the #Vehicle.', 'The #Vehicle is the means of conveyance of the #Theme.', 'Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion expresses the #Source.', 'The #Path describes the trajectory of the motion.', 'The #Goal is the endpoint of the trajectory of motion.', 'The #Area is the location where the motion takes place.', 'The #Manner describes a property of the motion not related to its trajectory.', 'The #Distance is the extent of the motion.', 'The #Duration is the amount of time the motion takes.', 'The #Speed is the rate at which the motion occurs.', 'The #Road is the thoroughfare on which the #Vehicle travels.', 'The #Route is the usual path that the #Vehicle travels.', 'When the riding takes place.', 'The #Purpose for which the #Theme rides a vehicle.']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; Involves topological/kinesthetic primitives: Path, Container, Force.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The #Protagonist who is exerting effort to meet the pre-conditions for participating in the #Activity.

<ex>How <fex name="pro">a small hospital</fex> <t>rose</t> to the challenge of a legionella outbreak.</ex>', 'The #Activity that the #Protagonist expends efforts towards.

<ex>She <t>rose</t> <t>to</t> <t>the</t> <t>occasion</t> <fex name="act">of bringing up her children single-handed even as a woman who was not educated except a few years in Primary school</fex>.</ex>', 'The extent to which the #Protagonist exceeds or falls short of the minimum requirements for participating in the #Activity as a result of expending effort to get themselves ready.

<ex>I m used to second books not living up the promise of the first, but Nero Blanc <fex name="deg">fully</fex> <t>rose</t> to the challenge.</ex>', 'An action performed by the #Protagonist which enables them to overcome the difficulties and engage in the #Activity.

<ex>Learn how one small shop <t>rose</t> to the challenge <fex name="mea">through the use of gift tables</fex>.</ex>', 'The time at which the #Protagonist through expenditure of effort becomes capable of engaging in the #Activity.  

<ex>A president for whom the jury was still out for many Americans first appeared shaken, but <fex name="tim">then</fex> <t>rose</t> to the</ex> crisis.', 'The location in which the #Protagonist expends effort to become capable of engaging in the #Activity.

<ex>Students from a number of Metropolitan schools <t>rose</t> to the challenge <fex name="pla">at DMIT s Panorama Campus</fex> on Friday 22nd August and spent the day  participating in an annual  Taste of Engineering  activity.</ex>', 'Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (<ment>probably</ment>, <ment>presumably</ment>, <ment>mysteriously</ment>), general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Protagonist that also affect the action (<ment>eagerly</ment>).

<ex>Despite all odds the brave Macedonian people heroically <t>rose</t> to the task <fex name="man">with valour</fex>.</ex>']

descriptions: ['Something judged to be desirable or valuable which might be lost or damaged.', 'An event that may occur or a state which may hold which could result in the loss of or damage to the #Asset.', 'The #Situation under which the #Asset is safe or unsafe.', 'A modifier expressing the deviation of the actual level of security from the expected value given the #Asset, the #Situation, and state indicated by the target itself.', 'The #Time during which the degree of safeness holds.', 'The #Place at which the degree of safeness holds.']
classificationExplanation: FEs indicate properties: Value, Extent, Degree; applies to an Entity or Holder.; Core FEs: State, Condition; describes static situations; lacks Goal or Result.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The #Situation which may lead to a harmful event.

<ex>Most people agree, <fex name="Situation">going over 100mph</fex> <m>is</m> <t>unsafe</t>.</ex>', 'Something judged to be desirable or valuable which might be lost or damaged.

<ex>Honey is not <t>safe</t> <fex name="Asset">for babies</fex>.</ex>', 'A concrete or abstract entity which may come to cause the loss of, or damage to the Asset.

<ex><fex name="Dangerous_entity">That man</fex> is a <t>risk</t>!</ex>', 'A modifier expressing the deviation of the actual level of security from the expected value given the #Situation and the state indicated by the target itself.

<ex>Rogue nations <m>are</m> our <fex name="Degree">greatest</fex> <t>threat</t>.</ex>', 'A particular location for which the #Situation is safe. Frequently, it is to be inferred that the characteristics of the location make various #Situations safe or unsafe.', 'The time period during which the #Situation has the specified level of safety.', 'The #Circumstances in which an #Asset is at risk.']
classificationExplanation: FEs indicate properties: Value, Extent, Degree; applies to an Entity or Holder.; Core FEs: State, Condition; describes static situations; lacks Goal or Result.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['This is the religious or cultural leader who performs and/or leads the rite.

<ex><fex name="Ldr">The medicine man</fex> performs this <t>ritual</t></ex>', 'The FE #Member describes the member of the religious or cultural group who participates in/undergoes the rite.

<ex><fex name="Mbr">Joe</fex> received <t>communion</t>.</ex>', '#Organization identifies the institution in which the rite is prescribed.

<ex>His <t>baptism</t> <fex name="Org">into the Catholic Church</fex> is scheduled for next Sunday.</ex>', 'This FE identifies the #Instrument used to perform a particular rite.

<ex>We <t>baptise</t> children <fex name="Instrument">with holy water</fex></ex>', 'This FE identifies the state which the rite is hoped or intended to bring about.
<ex>They performed a <fex name="DesS">fertility</fex> <t>ritual</t>.</ex>', 'The type of ritual or ceremony being performed.

<ex>We performed the traditional <fex name="Type">marriage</fex> <t>rites</t></ex>', 'This FE indicates an object on which a rite is performed.

<ex>The priest <t>blessed</t> <fex name="Obj">the wine</fex></ex>', 'Rites may confer a #New_status on a participant (e.g. rank, membership).

<ex>Elliott was almost <t>ordained</t> <fex name="NStat">as a priest</fex></ex>', 'The #Guardian is the member of the #Organization who instigates the rite for someone of which they are a guardian.

<ex><fex name = "Guardian">Mr. and Mrs. Wilson</fex> <t>baptized</t> their son.</ex>', 'The action that is taken to perform the ritual.

<ex>A building is <t>consecrated</t> <fex name="Mns">by anointing the doorposts with special oil and saying certain prayers</fex></ex>', 'Manner of performing the rite', 'When the rite is performed', 'Where the rite takes place.']

descriptions: ['The #Roadway is the roadway that connects locations.', 'The #Source is one of the #Endpoints treated as a source.', 'The #Goal is one of the #Endpoints of the #Roadway treated as a goal.', 'The #Endpoints are two (or more) named endpoints of the #Roadway.', 'The #Characteristic is a characteristic(s) of the #Roadway.', 'The #Name is the name of the #Roadway.', 'This is the setting through which the #Roadway goes.', 'The #Use is the purpose of the #Roadway.', 'The #Direction is the direction or directions the #Roadway runs.', 'The #Relative_location is where the #Roadway is located.', 'The #Material is what the #Roadway is constructed from.', 'The #Frequency_of_use is the state of the #Roadway with regard to the number of people who are using the #Roadway or typically use it.', 'The #Abundant_entities are the entities which occupy the space denoted by the #Roadway.', 'The #Length is the distance the #Roadway extends.', 'A subpart of the #Roadway.']

descriptions:
['The #Perpetrator is the person (or other agent) that takes the #Goods away by force or threats.  <ex><fex name="Perpetrator">Leslie</fex> <t>robbed</t> Kim of her watch.</ex>', 'The #Victim is the person (or other sentient being or group) that owns the #Goods before they are taken away by the #Perpetrator.

<ex>Leslie <t>robbed</t> <fex name="Victim">Kim</fex> of her watch.</ex>', 'Source is the initial location of the goods, before they change location.
<ex>Leslie and Kim <t>robbed</t> <fex name="Source">a bank</fex></ex>
This FE is realized in compound nouns as follows:
<ex><fex name="Source">bank</fex> <t>robbery</t></ex>', 'The #Goods are anything (including labor, time, or legal rights) that can be taken away.

<ex>Leslie <t>robbed</t> John <fex name="Goods">of his watch</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Means indicates the means by which the Robbery takes place.

<ex>John <t>mugged</t> his victim <fex name="Means">by holding a toy gun to his head</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Manner describes the way in which the Robbery took place.

<ex>He was known for committing <fex name="Manner">violent</fex> <t>muggings</t> on schoolchildren</ex>', 'The #Place is where the Robbery occurs.

<ex>They <t>robbed</t> a bank <fex name="Place">in North Berkeley</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Time indicates when the Robbery occurs.

<ex>They <t>ROBBED</t> a bank in North Berkeley <fex name="Time">last May</fex>.</ex>', 'The action that the #Perpetrator is trying to accomplish by the robbery.

<ex>They used to <t>rob</t> folks <fex name="Purp">just to see the expression on their faces</fex>.</ex>']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The #Agent is the sentient being who manipulates the #Rope.

<ex><fex name="Agent">Melissa</fex> <t>braided</t> Jessica s hair.</ex>', 'The basically linear object which is manipulated by the #Agent to produce a #Knot.

<ex>He <t>tied</t> <fex name="Rope">an electrical cable</fex> around the trunk and his neck before hanging himself .</ex>', 'The stable configuration of a #Rope which results from tying.

<ex>Jake <t>tied</t> the cravat <fex name="Knot">into an acceptable knot</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Instrument with which the #Rope is manipulated.', 'Where the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.', 'The #Purpose for which the manipulation of the #Rope takes place. 

<ex>Prof. Frink <t>braided</t> my hair <fex name="Purpose">to make me look beautiful</fex>.</ex>', 'When the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.

<ex>Terri <t>tied</t> the rope around her waist <fex name="Time">before scrambling up the side of the mountain</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Means by which the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.', '#Manner in which the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.

<ex>John <t>knotted</t> the tie <fex name="Manr">tightly</fex> around his neck.</ex>']
classificationExplanation: Key FEs: Agent, Theme, Goal; indicates change or interaction; often includes Time/Manner.; FEs show spatial/logical relations: Location, Path, Cause; connects entities or events.

descriptions:
['The #Patient is the entity that undergoes a change.  <ex><fex name="Patient">The leaves</fex> <t>rotted</t> into a mass of slime.</ex> <ex><fex name="Patient">The dresses</fex> <t>decayed</t> from their former beauty.</ex>', 'The #Place is where the rotting occurs.

<ex>Any traces of uneaten food will <t>decompose</t> <fex name="Place">in your tank</fex> and foul the water.</ex>', 'The #Time indicates when the rotting occurs.

<ex><fex name="Time">Before he could get to the specimen</fex> , its entrails had <t>decomposed</t> so badly that they had to be thrown away.</ex>', 'The #Initial_state is the original state of the #Patient.  <ex>The dresses <t>decayed</t> <fex name="I_state">from their former beauty</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Duration indicates the amount of time for which the #Patient rots.  <ex>That thorn had been there , <t>festering</t>, <fex name="Dur">for months</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Speed is the rate at which the #Patient changes.  <ex>A dead snail <t>decomposes</t> <fex name="Spd">very rapidly</fex>, fouling the water badly.</ex>', 'The #Degree expressions that indicate to what degree the #Patient has changed.  <ex> Its entrails had <fex name="Degree">totally</fex> <t>decomposed</t>.</ex> <ex>Before he could get to the specimen , its entrails had <t>decomposed</t> <fex name="Deg">so badly that they had to be thrown away</fex>.</ex>', 'Any description of the Rotting event  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  secondary effects (horribly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

<ex>The soldiers  wounds <t>festered</t> <fex name="Manner">slowly</fex></ex>']

descriptions:
['The person who is at risk of some #Bad_outcome', 'A situation that the #Protagonist would like to avoid.
<ex>There was no <t>risk</t> <fex name="Bad">of his returning</fex>.</ex>', 'Something desirable possessed by or directly associated with the #Protagonist which might be lost or damaged.
<ex>The <t>risk</t> <fex name="Asset">to his reputation</fex> was significant.</ex>', 'The #Action that creates the risk.
<ex><fex name="Action">Implementing this program</fex> <supp>runs</supp> the <t>risk</t> of offending our core constituents.</ex>', 'The place where there is risk.
<ex>There is always some <t>danger</t> to rich men <fex name="Place">in a bar like this</fex>.</ex>', 'The probability of something bad happening to the #Protagonist.
<ex>If he is uncertain of right and wrong, he is in <fex name="Sev">dire</fex> <t>peril</t> of losing his immortal soul.</ex>', 'The time when the risk pertains. ex:Even after the end of Apartheit we still run the of letting racism continue forever.']

descriptions:
['The #Agent gives up the #Asset in hopes of receiving a greater #Benefit.

<ex><fex name="age">We</fex> never <t>sacrifice</t> quality for price.</ex>', 'The item which is sacrificed by the #Agent.

<ex>We never <t>sacrifice</t> <fex name="ass">quality</fex> for price.</ex>', 'The #Agent hopes to receive or gain advantage from the #Benefit as a result of giving up the #Asset.

<ex>We never <t>sacrifice</t> quality <fex name="ben">for price</fex>.</ex>', 'The way that the #Agent sacrifices the #Asset.

<ex>So many people <fex name="Manr">gladly</fex> <t>compromise</t> comfort to look more attractive.</ex>', 'This FE indicates the #Time when the #Agent gives up the #Asset.

<ex><fex name="Tim">In wartime</fex> much was <t>compromised</t> in favor of security</ex>']

descriptions:
['The #Collection whose #Quantity is under consideration.

<ex>Relax, <fex name="col">oil supplies</fex> <m>are</m> <t>plentiful</t>.</ex>', 'The feature of an #Collection which is under discussion. This FE is incorporated by all the lexical units in this frame.

<ex>The majority of specimens were poorly represented, as judged by the small size of mature plants, the immaturity of thalli or <t>scarceness</t> <fex name="qua">in occurrence</fex>.</ex>', 'The location in which the #Collection occurs.

<ex>Northern Pike are <t>plentiful</t> <fex name="pla">in Perrault Lake</fex>.</ex>', 'A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Measure from the norm or from the value for another #Collection.

<ex>Iron is <fex name="deg">very</fex> <t>scarce</t> inside the human body, so pneumococcal bacteria have mechanisms to obtain iron more easily.</ex>', 'The measure of the #Quantity, which is incorporated by the lexical units.']

descriptions:
['The sentient being who schedules an #Event to take place at a #Time and #Place.

<ex><fex name="Agent">I</fex> <t>set</t> <t>up</t> a meeting with Carlos on Monday.</ex>', 'The incident that the #Agent has scheduled to take place at a #Time and #Place.

<ex>I d like to <t>set</t> <t>up</t> <fex name="Event">a meeting with Mr. Hofmann</fex>.</ex>', 'The time at which the #Event is scheduled to take place.

<ex>Maria <t>scheduled</t> the appointment <fex name="Scheduled_time">for Monday</fex>.</ex>', 'The location where the #Agent has scheduled the #Event to take place.

<ex>Gina <t>scheduled</t> a dentist appointment for Monday <fex name="Place">in Berkeley</fex>.</ex>', 'The means used by the #Agent in order to schedule the #Event.

<ex>Chad always <t>schedules</t> his appointments <fex name="Means">via email</fex>.</ex>', 'The <fex name="Agent">Agent s</fex> motivation for scheduling the #Event.

<ex>My boss <t>scheduled</t> a meeting <fex name="Purpose">to let us know how great we were doing</fex>.</ex>', 'The way in which the #Agent schedules the #Event. 

<ex>Jackie <fex name="Manner">hastily</fex> <t>scheduled</t> an appointment with a psychologist this evening.</ex>', 'This FE describes the time at which the scheduling occurs.']

descriptions:
['The person who is looking all over the #Ground for the #Sought_entity.

<ex><fex name="sea">They</fex> first gained entry into the house of Raja Rao, who resides on the ground floor and <t>ransacked</t> the house for valuables.</ex>', 'The location that the #Searcher covers in looking for the #Sought_entity.

<ex>I had never really seen much on the bigfoot subject or I would have <t>scoured</t> <fex name="gro">the area</fex> for signs and looked for droppings</ex>', 'The entity that the #Searcher wants to find.

<ex>Coast Guard and Navy ships and aircraft <t>combed</t> the area <fex name="sou">for the six aircraft</fex></ex>', 'This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Searcher scrutinizes the #Ground.

<ex>We <fex name="man">carefully</fex> <t>scoured</t> the road for what damaged all of those tires and we finally found it- a piece of nasty, barbed wire, laying across the road.</ex>', 'This FE specifies the length of the interval during which the scouring activtiy takes place.

<ex>He <t>combed</t> the area <fex name="dur">for hours</fex> that night looking for the dogs and has been searching ever since.</ex>', 'This FE identifies the #Degree to which the #Searcher scrutinizes the #Ground.', 'An entity manipulated by the #Searcher to examine the #Ground.

<ex>They <t>scoured</t> the entire beach <fex name="ins">with a metal detector</fex>, but found nothing.</ex>', 'The action of the #Searcher that allows them to search the #Ground.', 'The state-of-affairs that the #Searcher hopes to bring about by searching a #Ground.

<ex>We <t>scoured</t> the entire book <fex name="pur">to find this supposed evidence</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Time when the #Searcher scoures the #Ground.']

descriptions:
['The #Cognizer pays attention to an entity in order to discover something about it. 

<ex><fex name="Cognizer">Leslie</fex> <t>examined</t> the glass for cracks.</ex>', 'The #Cognizer pays attention to the #Ground, so named because it serves as the background or context for the #Phenomenon. 

<ex>Leslie <t>examined</t> <fex name="Ground">the glass</fex> for cracks.</ex>
<ex>Kim <t>searched</t> <fex name="Ground">the woods</fex> for mushrooms.</ex>', 'The entity that the #Cognizer is alert for in the #Ground.

<ex>Leslie <t>examined</t> the glass <fex name="Phenomenon">for cracks</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Kim <t>searched</t> the woods <fex name="Phenomenon">for mushrooms</fex>.</ex>', 'This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Cognizer scrutinizes the #Ground.', 'The action of the #Cognizer which allows them to scrutinize the #Ground.', 'This FE identifies the #Degree to which the #Cognizer scrutinizes the #Ground.', 'An entity directed by the #Cognizer  that interacts with the #Ground to accomplish the scrutiny.

<ex>The temperature controller <t>monitored</t> the temperature <fex name="ins">with a calibrated silicon diode</fex>.</ex>']

descriptions: ['The #Cognizer pays attention to an entity in order to discover something about it.', 'The #Cognizer pays attention to the #Ground, so named because it serves as the background or context for the #Phenomenon.', 'The #Medium is the piece of text or work in which the #Cognizer pays attention to an entity in order to discover something about it.', 'An entity directed by the #Cognizer that interacts with the #Ground to accomplish the scrutiny.', 'It identifies the #Manner in which the #Cognizer scrutinizes the #Ground.', 'It is used for the #Means by which the #Cognizer to scrutinize the #Ground.', 'The #Time when the #Cognizer is scrutinizing the #Ground.']

descriptions:
['The #Cognizer pays attention to the #Ground in order to find instances of a type of #Phenomenon.

<ex><fex name="Cognizer">Leslie</fex> <t>examined</t> the glass for cracks.</ex>', 'The #Cognizer pays attention to the #Ground, so named because it serves as the background or context for the #Phenomenon. 

<ex>Leslie <t>examined</t> <fex name="Ground">the glass</fex> for cracks.</ex>
<ex>Kim <t>searched</t> <fex name="Ground">the woods</fex> for mushrooms.</ex>', 'The entity that the #Cognizer is alert for in the #Ground.

<ex>Leslie <t>examined</t> the glass <fex name="Phenomenon">for cracks</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Kim <t>searched</t> the woods <fex name="Phenomenon">for mushrooms</fex>.</ex>', 'This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Cognizer scrutinizes the #Ground.', 'The action of the #Cognizer which allows them to scrutinize the #Ground.', 'This FE identifies the #Degree to which the #Cognizer scrutinizes the #Ground.', 'The event that the #Cognizer hopes to bring about by looking for the #Phenomenon.

<ex>You should <t>inspect</t> your mail <fex name="Purp">to determine the outcome of the module transfer</fex>.</ex>', 'An entity directed by the #Cognizer  that interacts with the #Ground to accomplish the scrutiny.

descriptions:
['The #Phenomenon is the activity, state or object that is purposefully hidden from the awareness of a potential cognizer.', 'This FE identifies the #Degree to which the #Phenomenon is hidden from cognizers.', 'A period of #Time during which the #Phenomenon is hidden from the awareness of potential cognizers.

<ex>There was stuff in there that was  <t>secret</t>  <fex name="Time">in the 1980s</fex>, but has since become pretty common knowledge.</ex>', 'The #Cognizer is the person who might become aware of the #Phenomenon if it was not concealed.


<ex>Moreover, the blood and decorations were sacred and could only be removed in
a procedure which was <t>secret</t> <fex name="cog">from women</fex></ex>']

descriptions: ['The #Cognizer realizes the existence of a deception and is not misled by it.', 'The #State_of_affairs is intended to be perceived and taken to be true even though it is not.', 'The #Focal_entity is a part of the deception (possibly also the agent behind it) which is perceived by the #Cognizer to be misleading.', 'An act performed by the Cognizer which enables them to figure something out.', 'Medium is the text created by the Cognizer to communicate that they came to believe a specified State_of_affairs.', 'Some verbs in this frame may occur with postverbal Topic expressions', 'The Degree to which the Cognizer comes to understand the State_of_affairs.', 'Depictive phrase describing the Cognizer.', 'Manner of performing an action', 'The location at which the Cognizer realizes the State_of_affairs.', 'The time at which the Cognizer discovers the State_of_affairs.']

descriptions:
['The person who attempts to find the Sought_entity.
<fex name="Cognizer_agent">John</fex>  <t>looked</t> for his pencil.', 'This is the entity that the Ground may contain. Typically, it is expressed as a<ment>for</ment>-PP. 
Leslie <t>examined</t> the glass <fex name="Sought_entity">for cracks</fex>. 
Kim <t>searched</t> in the woods <fex name="Sought_entity">for mushrooms</fex>. 
Some words in this frame allow alternate expressions of the Ground and the Sought_entity:  We searched the yard for my contact lens. We searched for my contact lends in the yard.', 'This is the entity to which the Cognizer pays attention. It is referred to as <t>Ground</t> because it serves as the background or context for the Phenomenon. This FE can be expressed as an NP Object or as a PP Complement: Leslie <t>examined</t> <fex name="Ground">the glass</fex> for cracks. Kim <t>searched</t> <fex name="Ground">in the woods</fex> for mushrooms.', 'Manner of performing an action', 'An act of the #Cognizer_agent that allows them to look for the #Sought_entity.
<ex>They <t>foraged</t> for clams <fex name="Mns">by visiting the pools at low tide</fex>.</ex>', 'The failure or success of an attempt.', 'A spatial setting larger than the Ground in which the Seeking event occurs.

<ex><fex name="Place">In Paris</fex> police were <t>hunting</t> for suspects in two of the city s southerns suburbs today</ex>', 'This FE identifies the time when the Seeking occurs.

<ex>The police were <t>hunting</t> for evidence in my house <fex name="Time">yesterday</fex></ex>', 'An action that the Cognizer intends to accomplish by performing the search.

<ex>Police were <t>hunting</t> for evidence in my house <fex name="Purpose">to mislead their real suspect about the state of the investigation</fex></ex>', 'This FE identifies the amount of effort put into an attempt.']

descriptions:
['The #Agent makes an attempt to achieve a #State_of_affairs or to  obtain a #Sought_entity.

<ex><fex name="age">Those states</fex> <t>sought</t> a remedy that would substantially change the company s business
practices.</ex>', 'The entity that the #Agent attempts to acquire.

<ex>Or the monstrous Saddam, who filled mass graves to bursting, invaded two neighboring countries, and avidly <t>sought</t> <fex name="sou">weapons of mass destruction</fex>.</ex>', 'A state or event that the #Agent wants to bring about. The Agent may but need not be a participant in that #State_of_affairs.

<ex> His enemies <t>sought</t> <fex name="soa">his destruction</fex>.</ex>', 'The #Outcome is the failure or success of an attempt to acquire a #Sought_entity.

<ex>WWDA also <fex name="out">successfully</fex> <t>sought</t> funding from Office of the Status of Women</ex>', 'This FE identifies the #Means by which an attempt at achieving a #State_of_affairs or at acquiring the #Sought_entity is made.

<ex>Agassi <t>sought</t> relief <fex name="Means">by taking Advil</fex>.</ex>', 'This FE identifies the amount of effort put into an attempt.

<ex>He also <t>sought</t> <fex name="Degr">intensely</fex> to know more of Christ.</ex>', 'This FE identifies the #Time when the attempt occurs.', 'The place where the #Agent is seeking to achieve a particular #State_of_affairs or to acquire a #Sought_entity.

<ex>The disclosure came as prosecutors successfully <t>sought</t> <fex name="Place">in federal court</fex> to keep Luise Garofalo behind bars.</ex>', 'The #Manner in which the #Agent makes the attempt.', 'An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by bringing about a particular #State_of_affairs or acquiring the #Sought_entity.']

descriptions: ['It is the living being which moves under its own power. Normally it is expressed as an external argument.', 'It is used for any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion.In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion.  With particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.', 'It is used for any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal.', 'It is used for any expression which tells where the #Self_mover ends up as a result of the motion.', 'It is used for expressions which describe a general area in which motion takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular and not to consist of a single linear path.  Note that this FE should not be used for cases when the same phrase could be used with the same meaning with a non-motion target, since these should be annotated with the #Place FE.', 'The direction that the #Self_mover heads in during the motion.', 'Any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory or rate of motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.', 'Any expression which characterizes the extent of motion expresses the frame element #Distance.', 'The time when the motion occurs.', 'The rate at which the location of the #Self_mover changes with respect to time.', 'An act whereby the #Self_mover achieves movement.', 'The amount of time for which a state holds or a process is ongoing.', 'It identifies the purpose for which a #Self_mover moves.', 'The #Place is the location within which a defined motion takes place.  Any specified or implied  #Source, #Path or #Goal should designate a location contained with the #Place. This FE can be differentiated from #Area by the fact that the annotated phrase can be used in the same meaning with non-motion targets.', 'The shape of the overall #Path travelled by the #Self_mover.']

descriptions:
['This is the person who initiates the movement of the #Theme and, unlike Carrying, does not accompany it.', 'The end of the path and intended goal of the sending.
I <t>sent</t> the logs <fex name="Goal">to the shed</fex>.', 'The objects being sent.
I mailed <fex name="Theme">the books</fex> <fex name="Goal">to Alaska</fex>.
Note that #Theme may be multiply instantiated.
They <t>mailed</t><fex name="Theme">a questionnaire</fex> <fex name="Theme">with a return envelope</fex>.', 'The mode of sending employed.
I <t>shipped</t> <fex name="Theme">the crops</fex> <fex name="Transport_means">by bigrig </fex>.', 'This is the recipient of the sent #Theme.
<fex name="Sender">Tess</fex> <t>mailed</t> <fex name="Theme">a letter</fex> <fex name="Recipient"> to Abby</fex>', 'Path along which movement occurs.
I  shipped the books <fex name="Path">along Interstate 65</fex>.', 'The beginning of the path, similar to source except that it serves to define the path.
I sent wood <fex name="Source">from Illinois</fex> <fex name="Goal">to California</fex>.', 'Degree to which event occurs', 'This FE is any expression characterizing the extent of motion of the Theme. Pat <t>threw</t> the Javelin <fex name="Distance">50 meters</fex>.', 'Manner of performing an action', 'The #Purpose of the sending.
<ex>Rachel <t>sent</t> the letter to her mother <fex name="Purpose">to let her know about the marriage</fex>.</ex>', 'When the sending takes place
<ex>I <t>sent</t> the letter to you <fex name="Time">last week</fex>.</ex>', 'A spatial setting encomnpassing the Source location, where the Sending event takes place.

<ex>Barney <t>posted</t> the letter on Monday <fex name="Place">in Athens</fex></ex>']
